sharedPost.text:
⚓ MALE DANCERS: ELEVATE YOUR CAREER AT SEA! ⚓
Are you a professionally trained Male Dancer with exceptional technique and a strong background in Classical Ballet and Contemporary? Ready to trade the studio for a stage that sails the world?

We are seeking polished and versatile male dancers to join our elite theatre ensembles on luxury cruise ships! This is your opportunity to perform in spectacular, high-energy productions while exploring global destinations.

The Spotlight Awaits:
Lead Performer in lavish theatre shows, dinner shows, special events, and high-impact pool shows.

Execute complex, fast-paced choreography with precision across multiple styles including Ballet, Modern, and Jazz.

Depending on suitability, integrate specialty artistic elements or routines (e.g., floor work or basic aerials) into the company's show formats.

Collaborate with the artistic team to create thrilling new performance pieces.

What We Are Looking For:
Exceptional Training: Completed certified performing arts training or similar professional qualification.

Classical Foundation: Strong professional training in Ballet, Modern, and Jazz dancing is essential.

Experience: Several years of professional stage production experience is highly desirable.

Versatility: Ability to learn choreography quickly and precisely; basic singing and acting training are a plus.

Language: Must be proficient in both spoken and written English.

Attitude: Highly motivated, a reliable team player, and focused on providing a world-class guest experience.

Don't let this opportunity sail by! Audition for a life-changing contract today.

🔗 View the full job description and APPLY NOW: https://www.5entertain.com/jobs/dancers-for-cruise-ships

#maledancer #dancerlife #CruiseShipPerformer #ballet #contemporarydance #jobsatsea #ApplyNow

items.text:
Cześć, cześć! ☺️ 
CASTING AKTORSKI – DOŁĄCZ DO NAS! 🩵

Szukamy nowych twarzy do produkcji serialu paradokumentalnego! Sprawdź poniższe role i znajdź coś dla siebie 👇

⭐️9–11 maja | MICHAŁ (29 - 33 lata)

Ekonomista pracujący w banku, który po godzinach trenuje zapasy. Niewysoki, ale dobrze zbudowany. Na co dzień elegancki (garnitur i krawat), prywatnie – swobodny styl.
👉 Postać wybuchowa, zazdrosna i impulsywna – szukamy aktora z mocną osobowością i wyrazistą ekspresją.

⭐️14–16 maja | JUDYTA (22 - 28 lat)

Główna bohaterka – pielęgniarka. Atrakcyjna, energiczna, pełna życia, choć momentami niepewna siebie.
👉 Ciepła, otwarta, przeżywająca emocjonalne rozterki. W trakcie historii przechodzi wyraźną przemianę.

⭐️12–14 maja | MAREK (23 - 29 lat)

Właściciel sieci pizzerii. Wysoki, sympatyczny, zadbany, o ujmującym uśmiechu.
👉 Inteligentny i przedsiębiorczy, zakochany – szukamy naturalności i charyzmy.

⭐️22–24 maja | DANKA (24 – 26 lat)

Niepozorna, ale niezwykle zdeterminowana. Pasjonatka motoryzacji.
👉 Postać z charakterem – gotowa na wyzwania (również aktorskie transformacje!).

⭐️17–19 maja | KRZYSZTOF  (30 - 35 lat)

Charyzmatyczny alpinista, wysportowany i pewny siebie.
👉 Inteligentny, wykształcony, z silną osobowością i emocjonalną głębią.

🤓WARUNKI WSPÓŁPRACY
💰 Stawka: 1000 zł brutto za dzień zdjęciowy
🚗 Zapewniamy zwrot kosztów dojazdu
🏨 Gwarantujemy nocleg w hotelu

💌 ZGŁOSZENIA
Wyślij swoje zgłoszenie na adres: 

AKTORZY@UNAGIMEDIA.PL
👉 W tytule maila wpisz wybraną postać

Każde zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:

🔮imię i nazwisko
🔮wiek
🔮numer kontaktowy
🔮zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki
🔮wideowizytówkę
🔮informację o ukończonej szkole (OBOWIĄZKOWO)

⭐️ Nie zwlekaj – pokaż się i daj się zauważyć! Może to właśnie Ty zagrasz jedną z naszych historii! ⭐️

items.text:
W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące  role męskie:

1.Dziki (43) – dobrze zbudowany, może mieć tatuaże. Kieruje gangiem handlarzy narkotyków, który zajmuje się głównie rozprowadzaniem fentanylu. Gdy dochodzi do pobicia Grażyny i kradzieży narkotyków, postanawia sam namierzyć sprawców i odbić towar. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2.Sebastian Wroński (53) – podstarzały podrywacz. Zamożny. Przemocowiec, który robi się agresywny po alkoholu. Często zdradzał żonę. Cały czas szukał młodszych kobiet, żeby je sponsorować w zamian za seks.

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3.Zdzisław Marecki (54) – średniego wzrostu, chudawy, trochę schorowany. Drobny złodziejaszek, mieszka w ośrodku dla osób, które niedawno opuściły zakład karny.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4.Ernest (29) – dobrze zbudowany. Chłopak Patrycji. Bardzo chciałby wejść do półświatka. Ma nadzieję, że napad na Grażynę mu w tym pomoże.

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

5.Gruby (28) – silny, wysoki, masywny. Kolega Ernesta zwerbowany do pomocy w napadzie na Grażynę. NIEZBĘDNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

6.Igor Krawczyk (43) – oficjalnie bezrobotny, ale pracuje na czarno w szemranej firmie pożyczkowej. Wpada w spiralę zbrodni, kończy na zabójstwie żony i jej kochanka. AKTOR

Daty: 20. i 23. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7.Robert Zalewczuk, ps. Maniek (27) – drobny przestępca, typ dresika-oszusta. Przy kasie, ale ubiera się bez gustu. 

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

8.Roman Niciak (41) – ma biznes z nielegalnymi pożyczkami. Nalana twarz alkoholika, agresywny i wulgarny.

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9.Barman (31) – barman w spelunce. 

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Looking for Go Go dancers / A Belly Dancer / A LED-Laser Dancer for a long term contract in Dubai to perform During the weekend.

1919…
एक आदमी सिर्फ £30 लेकर निकला…

ना कोई funding…
ना कोई support…

लेकिन उसके पास एक rule था —
“सस्ता बेचो… सही दो… और कभी धोखा मत दो…”

आज वही rule बना — Tesco 🏪

लोग products के लिए नहीं…
भरोसे के लिए वापस आते हैं…

👉 याद रखना —
Business पैसा नहीं… भरोसा कमाने का खेल
आप क्या चुनोगे?
💰 Short-term profit
या
🤝 Long-term trust

👇 Comment में बताओ

items.text:
LOS ANGELES CASTING 🇳🇱

SKECHERS commercial for DUTCH TV featuring soccer legend Ruud Gullit.

Seeking fluent/native Dutch speakers in Los Angeles for one-line principal roles.

Must be LA local hire and able to self-report to set in Los Angeles.

Non-Union. FICORE welcome.
Rate: $1,500 + 20% AF
Shoot: May 11 in Los Angeles
Fitting: May 8 in Los Angeles
Callbacks: May 7 via Zoom
Self-tapes: April 30 – May 6

ROLES:
Athletic Gym-Goer — Woman, 18–30
Athletic Man — Man, 30–40
Car Valet — Man, 18–29
Soccer Fan — Man, 30–40
Restaurant Diner — Man, 40–50
Waiter — Woman, 18–30

All ethnic appearances welcome.

Must speak real fluent Dutch — not Duolingo Dutch.

Submit via Casting Networks:
https://app.castingnetworks.com/public-pages/open-call/skechers-slip-ins-dutch-tv/13ced886-4469-11f1-8db6-331d4b78bece

Please share with Dutch speakers, Dutch actors, Dutch expats, and Netherlands/Benelux community members in Los Angeles.

items.text:
Hej, wiem że dosyć nietypowe ogłoszenie ale poszukujemy osoby niskorosłej do pewnego performance który odbędzie się w sierpniu w Słupsku. 
Potrzebujemy statysty na około 1-1,5h. Bardzo dobra stawka płatna odrazu po wykonaniu zadania. Proszę o tylko poważne oferty i rzeczywiście zainteresowane osoby. 
Jeśli jesteś taką osobą lub masz znajomego/znajoma to bardzo proszę o kontakt. 
Dodaje post z anonima ponieważ to będzie pewnego rodzaju niespodzianka:)

sharedPost.text:
Jak sprawdzić fejka?
Dobra zmiana w FB

Oczywiście nie ma tak naprawdę lekarstwa na fejki i jednego, zawsze sprawdzającego się sposobu, aby sprawdzić, czy konto fejkiem jest? FB jednak spory czas temu wprowadził aktualizację, dzięki której każde konto tak jak nadal mogło ukryć znajomych, tak nie mogło ukryć już jej liczby. To potrafi być pomocne, bo wielu ludziom pozapalała się niekiedy czerwona lampka.

Tym razem, a w sumie to całkiem niedawno, FB zrobił coś wspaniałego. Od bodajże kilkunastu dni widać dodatkową funkcję, która daje dość mocny argument. Tym narzędziem jest możliwość sprawdzenia daty założenia konta, ale niestety z dokładnością, co do miesiąca, a nie dnia.

W tym przypadku trzeba wejść na profil osoby sprawdzanej i w miejscu, gdzie jest jego imię i nazwisko po prostu kliknąć. Dzięki temu na dole pojawi się dodatkowe okno, czy też chmurka, gdzie wyraźnie widać wynik w pozycji „Dołączenie do Facebooka”. Moim jest kwiecień tego roku, bo FB skasował stare konto.

Dla przykładu dodałem zrzut ekranu z komórki, z mojego profilu wraz z odpowiednimi oznaczeniami. Gdyby ktoś chciał być dokładniejszy, to w komentarzu zamieszczam także i link.

Pamiętajcie, że sposób ten nie wyrokuje, aczkolwiek jest mocno pomocny, bo tak, czy inaczej, trzeba pytać. Pytajcie o portfolio i sprawdzajcie je w „Obiektyw Google”. Pytajcie o nazwę agencji, numer telefonu i wszelkie dane, które można potwierdzić. Pamiętajcie też, że dla przykładu Robercik, który jest znanym dewiantem, potrafi nawet założyć stronę swojej fejkowej agencji, a same konto potrafi skraść.

Na pewno nigdy nie wysyłajcie swoich nagich zdjęć, topless, czy też w bieliźnie. Bez względu na datę założenia profilu.

sharedPost.text:
# ⚖️ ...And Justice for All (1979) 🎬

## 🎭 Overview & Setting

**...And Justice for All** is a 1979 American legal drama film directed by Norman Jewison, starring Al Pacino, Jack Warden, and John Forsythe, with the Oscar-nominated screenplay written by Valerie Curtin and Barry Levinson. It was filmed on location in Baltimore, including the actual courthouse area. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/...And_Justice_for_All_(film)) 🏛️ The film belongs to that golden era of 1970s cinema when Hollywood wasn't afraid to take on big, uncomfortable truths about American society. It blends courtroom drama with dark comedy and raw emotional intensity, creating a viewing experience that is impossible to forget. The streets of Baltimore serve as the perfect grimy, realistic backdrop for a story about a legal system crumbling under the weight of its own corruption and hypocrisy. 🌆🗽

## 👨‍⚖️ The Story of Arthur Kirkland

Arthur Kirkland, played by Al Pacino, is an idealistic defense attorney in Baltimore, known for his unwavering belief in justice and ethical conduct. The film opens with Kirkland being held in contempt of court for attacking Judge Henry T. Fleming, highlighting the deep tension between them. [Spoiler Town](https://spoilertown.com/and-justice-for-all-1979/) 😤🔥 Arthur is not your typical slick, money-hungry lawyer — he is a man who genuinely, passionately cares about the people he represents. He visits his aging grandfather every week at a nursing home, showing a warmth and personal loyalty that stands in sharp contrast to the cold, indifferent legal machine grinding away around him. 👴❤️ He is the kind of man who cannot separate his heart from his work, and it is precisely this quality that makes his eventual breakdown so powerful and heartbreaking.

## 😱 The Impossible Moral Dilemma

It is well known that Arthur hates Judge Fleming. It is because of that public knowledge that Fleming requests Arthur to be his defense attorney when he is charged with the violent rape of Leah Shepard. [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0078718/plotsummary/) 😨 This is the film's central and most devastating hook — imagin

Casting call for upcoming short
Hello, we are hiring cast for our upcoming short film. If you or someone you know fits any of the description and is passionated about acting, can you please reach out to us? Details in the posters. 

No need for any experience, you can audition. Thanks.

Our past works can be found here for reference, if needed - https://youtube.com/@terracetalkies?si=6dHh_FUXB5kuHtau
items.title: Casting call for upcoming short

items.text:
🚨CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (NON-UNION, ATL)
Synopsis

A romantic drama that follows the lives of Tay and Ted from when they meet at 6 years old, to their adult lives as they navigate life’s obstacles without letting it tear them apart.

SVS Productions 

Non-Union

Shoot Dates: June 5th-10th, 2026

Compensation: Copy/Credit/Meals

Location: Atlanta, GA

Local Atlanta hires only.

Submission Deadline: May 6th, 2026

Available Roles:

TAY CAMERON – LEAD

Black female, ages 25–35 (must be able to portray ages 18–30 throughout the film).

Beautiful, prissy, and driven. Tay knows exactly what she wants for her future, but struggles to balance her career ambitions with her relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with the character Ted. No full make-out scenes.

TED BURGESS – LEAD

Black male, ages 25–35, 5’10” and over.

Very caring and loving. Ted deeply loves Tay but is growing tired of her consistently putting her career before their relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with Tay. No full make-out scenes.

YOUNG TED BURGESS – SUPPORTING

Black male, age 6-10. 

Ted meets Tay at this age and they develop a bond. He is caring and charismatic. 

SANDRA – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 40–50.

Ted’s mother. Outgoing, confident, and sexy.

LOGAN – SUPPORTING

Black male, ages 40–50.

Sandra’s husband. Well-dressed, educated, and polished.

GRANNY – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 60–75.

Logan’s mother and Ted’s grandmother. She helped raise Ted and played a major role in shaping him into the gentleman he is today.

Submission Instructions

Please submit headshot, resume, reel & or demo clips (if available) to: miles@svsmobb.com. Subject Line: [Role Name] Submission

Break a leg!
items.previewDescription: SVS Productions is a Multi-Media company that specializes in creating DOPE content for the world.

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

sharedPost.text:
What a fantastic group of singers, voice teachers and speech therapists you are! 🙌
Today we worked intensively on larynx height, AES, cricoid and thyroid tilt, jaw and lip movement, and anchoring – and I’m already looking forward to the next days together.

Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻 | Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶

Today we dove furthermore into the fascinating world of voice anatomy, practical aspects and acoustics. Alongside all the theory, there was plenty of practice, exchange, and shared learning – with joy, curiosity, and lots of aha moments guaranteed ✨

I’m really excited for Day 4 and 5 with you 🥳
Here’s to new insights, exciting exercises, and your continued vocal growth 💪🎤💫

📌Stimmtraining Anmeldung im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online
rummel@sing-teach.com | www.speak-teach.com | www.sing-teach.com

items.text:
We are casting for 3 roles for our short film 'Lost Souls'. The film provides great opportunity for new and upcoming actors to test themselves in significant roles.

The film is about crack addition and the things crack addicts have to go through in order to get drugs including street prostitution.

This is non paid but you will be compensated with travel expenses and food. Plus you will also receive show reel material and a IMDB credit. The film will also feature in film festivals.

The film is a raw, unflinching and brutally honest portrayal of crack addition. We are looking for only actors who can 100% commit to their role and story lines .

Millie

Lead character, 25, white, feisty, streetwise, slim, crack addict, street prostitute. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Sienna

25, White, fun-loving, crack head, slim, street prostitute. Best friend of the lead character. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Issie

21, naive, innocent, pretty, feminine, average build, crack user. Any ethnicity. Ethnicity not important.

Please reply to blondpublishing@gmail.com

Looking for a good-looking Model / Actress for a 1-day music video shoot 🎬✨
📍 Location: London

📅 Shoot Date: 5th or 7th May

🎵 Paid Opportunity

🎥 Music Video Production

We’re looking for someone with strong on-camera presence, confidence, style, and expressive energy. Previous modelling or acting experience is preferred.

Requirements:

• Good-looking and camera-friendly

• Comfortable performing on camera

• Modelling or acting experience preferred

• Positive attitude and professional vibe

To apply, send:

• Recent photos / portfolio

• Instagram handle

• Age & location

• Contact number

📩 DM or contact:

📞 0788717863 texted me 

📧 dhlondonmotionpictures@gmail.com

Please share with anyone who might fit 💫

#CastingCall #LondonCasting #MusicVideo #ModelSearch #ActressWanted #CastingNow #UKModels #MusicVideoShoot

items.text:
Headshots that read instantly on Spotlight thumbnails (and on any other casting platform, of course).

I specialise in expression-led actor headshots where the focus is on creating variety, clarity and distinct casting-ready images.

Shoot in my Grantham studio or at / near your home - relaxed, guided, and creative.

If you’re looking for headshots that feel believable and varied, feel free to drop me a message.

DMs welcome 🙂

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

items.summary:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

items.text:
I posted a few months back looking for advice moving forward with my son who is neurodivergent. Thanks to everyone’s advice we are now in acting classes, also my son in a specialised acting school. He’s doing theatre.  Both done short films (he got lead role) and played as featured extras in 2 credited movies for cinema release this year, also some promo work . 
Loving what we are doing and how things are going right now . So firstly wanted to see what people thought our acting age range would be. I’m 47 Dylan is 26 now. So I know what to apply for . Also  if there was any credited roles coming up I’m ready to try step into small roles but happy to do featured extra at minute if it is credited . And any more advice at this stage is welcomed, as I’m new just starting out 
Thank you

items.text:
Casting call and interest 
I know by looking at this picture, you all are like "What the hell" . Well I decided to write a comedy short so I can enter it into some festivals or maybe make it a web series. Looking to film this late September, but want to get the cast rolling . My two dicks ( Private Eyes )  are cast but looking for someone that can play a slapstick drunk, a couple that has great chemistry in arguing. 
And need about three or four extras as well. Will be a two or three night shoot. Food, reel and credit will be incorporated. This is a comedy , so let's have fun!
Email crawfordraun@gmail.com, attn : The two dicks picture
Send head shots and a small comedy reel or just a reel of yourself  to email above
Have all costumes for the roles and have the convenience store ready as well. This is going to be a blast !!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We are in dire need of extras this coming Friday morning to help us with our speed-dating scene. If you have availability and would be able to come help us out, it would be greatly appreciated. We are filming in the Denver area.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet on the day of.

We really hope to see you on set!!

[[https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6](https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6)](https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6)

items.text:
Casting for new talent
Hi, I am starting a video/filmmaking business and putting together COMEDY samples for Youtube and to promote the business.

I need actors, comedians for a few simple scenes.  No experience required (although helpful).  Must be professional and reliable. 

1. To play a wild pharmacist.  Male or female talent.  Ages 25-45 Should be corporate looking with an edge, such as wild hair, tattoos, etc.   
2. To play a comedy Lucifer character.  Male or female.  Prefer age 30-50  The wilder looking and more evil you can appear, the better.  Must have a sense of humor.

I will probably need 20-40 minutes of your time.  This is a great way to get some experience and start your acting career.

No pay, but you will get copy of the video, stills photos, credit and experience.

You can email a few photos and information to 1allancastle@gmail.com  

Thank you.  Allan

ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ.

Learn Hip-hop dance for beginners with our new instructor 𝗝𝗼𝘀𝗵𝘂𝗮 𝗟𝗶𝗺, to push your limits and unlock your full performance energy using your body. 🌴☀️

items.text:
** Limited Actor + Model Headshot Sessions (Downtown LA – First Come First Serve)**

We’re opening up a very limited set of professional headshot sessions designed specifically for actors, models, and creatives looking to update their portfolio, casting profiles, and branding images.

This is part of our community's mission to **make professional creative resources more accessible to underserved and emerging talent**, while still maintaining industry-level quality.

First come, first serve — we will reach out directly to confirmed applicants
Date: Tentatively Friday (final confirmation pending)

** SESSION OPTIONS**

** $50 — Quick Refresh**
• 15 minutes
• 1 look
• 1–2 edited images
•* 2 slots available *

**$100 — Standard Headshot (Most Recommended)**
• 30 minutes
• 1 look
• 2–4 edited images

*4 slots available *

 **$200 — Professional Session**
• 60 minutes
• 1 look
• 5–7 edited images

*3 slots available *

 **$300 — Premium Session**
• 60 minutes
• 2 looks
• Full guided shoot experience
• 6–10 edited images

*1 slots available *

**Only 10 slots available this round!**

**HOW TO BOOK**

**Comment below with:**
1. **Your name**
2. **The tier you’re interested in ($50 / $100 / $200 / $300)**
3. **Your availability for Friday**

**We will review responses and reach out directly to confirm time slots.**

items.text:
Vertical
Hey, temperature check:

Are there any Black/Latino actors and actresses in New York City, ages 20–45, with strong comedy chops who’d be interested in doing a vertical indie project?

Looking to shoot in May/June. This is an unpaid indie opportunity, working with experienced filmmakers. Seeking performers with sharp timing, personality, and comfort carrying comedy-driven material.

Great for actors looking to build material, collaborate, and create something fun.

If that’s you or you know someone great, drop a comment and I will DM you

items.text:
**ROLE FILLED**

RUSH CASTING CALL - Student Film
(Non union or union okay)

Tomorrow, May 2nd in La Mirada ($20 gas stipend) 8AM
Sunday, May 3rd in North Hollywood
COPY, CREDITS, BREAKFAST & LUNCH

RYAN - Lead supporting character. Age 25-35, male, a creative freelancer, super caring and sweet towards his long-term partner Emily but has felt a distance growing in their relationship. He goes to therapy but struggles to talk to others. Open to any ethnicity.

About the film:
When a stressed workaholic becomes invisible during her chaotic morning commute, she drifts through a world that no longer registers her existence and is forced to reconsider what she’s been missing in plain sight.

If interested in collaborating, please email  sarahniver@gmail.com with your name and contact info along with your reel and headshots. Thank you so much!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM **

**ROLE: BOB**
Male, White, Late 50s–early 60s

Bob is a traditional, working-class American husband. He’s emotionally detached, habit-driven, and comfortably unaware of his wife’s inner life. 

He is not overtly cruel—his neglect is casual, ingrained, and almost invisible. His humor is dry, dismissive, and occasionally biting without realizing the impact. There’s a subtle humanity underneath, but it rarely surfaces.

**Tone/Performance Notes:**
* Naturalistic, grounded performance (not caricature)
* Strong sense of timing for dark comedy
* Ability to play obliviousness with authenticity
* Minimal physicality; performance is largely internal and reactive

**Project Details:**
* Short film (dark comedy / psychological drama)
* Non-union / micro-budget (include rate if applicable)
* Filming in Los Angeles 
* Dates:TBD  late summer/ early fall

**To Submit:**
Please send headshot, resume, and reel (if available) to: Allamericandinner@gmail.com
Subject line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner”

items.text:
Casting do serialu „Trudne Sprawy” 

Do popularnego serialu paradokumentalnego poszukujemy zawodowego aktora w wieku** 23–33 lat** do roli przystojnego i sympatycznego biznesmena. 

Zdjęcia zaplanowane są na trzy dni zdjęciowe – **12, 13 oraz 14 maja**. Zapewniamy wynagrodzenie **1000 brutto za dzień**, zwrot kosztów dojazdu oraz zakwaterowanie w hotelu organizowane przez agencję.

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie zgłoszenia na adres **aktorzy@unagimedia.pl**, wpisując w tytule maila „Marek”. W wiadomości należy zawrzeć wiek i wzrost, informację o ukończonej szkole, dołączyć zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetki, opisać swoje doświadczenie aktorskie, a także załączyć nagranie wideowizytówki.

*Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami.*
*Do zobaczenia na planie!*

items.text:
Do teledysku o klimacie imprezowo–rozrywkowym 

szukamy **KOBIETY** (18–40 lat), 

która czuje się swobodnie przed kamerą i ma naturalną, wyrazistą energię.

Jeśli jesteś osobą otwartą, lubisz dobrą zabawę i nie boisz się pokazać swojej osobowości – to ogłoszenie jest dla Ciebie 🙂

items.text: Casting call for a student film

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Write Up BNU Film Production students are looking for cast in an upcoming film. A post apocalyptic student short film following a girl as she awakes and tries to find her dad, whilst dealing with her uncle keeping a secret and zombies on the prowl. We are looking for actors who fit the following descriptions: Lucy (Playing age around 18) girl who wakes in the apocalypse and is determined to find her father. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th.'

May be an image of text that says 'Jim (Playing age 40s) Former military and current doomsday p person. Lucy's uncle who hides a secret from her. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th. John (Playing age 40s) Lucy's loving father. Must be available on May 15th Zombie (Playing age around 18) A zombie Lucy encounters. Must be available on May 22nd If you are interested email 22308662@bucks.ac.uk This will be unpaid work but transport and food on the shooting days will be covered. Shooting will take place at Buckinghamshire New University's High Wycombe campus.'

items.text:
🎭 Singers/Actors wanted – New Musical (Demo Recording)

I’m a composer based in Gloucestershire, currently developing a new original musical, and I’m looking for a small group of singers/actors to help record a demo of a few songs.

The project: New musical (early development stage)

Piano-led score (recorded in Logic Pro)

Emotionally driven, character-focused songs.

What I’m looking for:3–5 singers / actors 

Comfortable singing solo or in small ensembles.

Musical theatre experience helpful but not essential.

Commitment: Very low pressure – a few relaxed sessions to record demo tracks.
Based around Gloucester / Hereford (flexible)

This is an unpaid, creative collaboration (for now)

Goal: To create a short demo (2–3 songs) to support development and potential showcase opportunities. 

If you’re interested (or just curious), drop me a message and I can send through a demo track and more info.

items.text:
*Stand up. Take your shoes off.*

*Imagine you are barefoot and the floor beneath you is ice. Every step gets harder — you feel the shock and the numbness. Where do you put your weight? How far do you dare to step?*

*Now the ice is gone. The floor is hot sand, and I mean hot like hell. You'd like both of your feet to never touch it again. But you have to keep moving, and force your feet against that hell.*

*The sand disappears. Sharp stones now. Uneven. Unpredictable. Each step is pure blood and pain.*

*And now — snakes. Everywhere. Moving. Tread carefully. Make wise decisions.*

*Notice what just happened. You didn't decide to respond. Your whole body responded — weight, breath, attention — all of it shifted without you choosing it.*

*That's the core of acting. Not deciding how to feel. Responding to what's there. When your body responds to the floor, it responds to everything — the situation, the other character, the moment.*

*Responsiveness isn't something you perform. It's something that happens when you're really in your circumstances. And it's the real gate to believing — both ends: you and the audience.*

*This is one of 24 exercises in a short practical guide — each one building on the last, from breath and relaxation all the way to full character work. No theory, just practice.*

*If you're interested in the full sequence, drop a comment or DM me.*

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

*Responsiveness isn't something you perform. It's something that happens when you're really in your circumstances. And it's the real gate to believing — both ends: you and the audience.*

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Casting agency recommendations?
Hi all, I have been doing my research into casting companies/agencies and what ones are the best on trustpilot. However I was wondering does anybody have any UK casting company recommendations? Or any personal experiences?. I have been with a couple in the past that turned out to be scams or just did not work out for me so I wanted to try some that were more reliable. Thankyou 💓

topComments.text: Simple rule of thumb is YOU NEVER PAY UPFRONT for anything. They make their money on the commissions from getting you work. Alessi Hartigan Casting is worth a look.
UVE,  Casting Collective, Phoenix all very good for support artists and extra work, also Entertainment Partners and Lucas Extras

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PAID (LOS ANGELES)
Casting a female actor for a dramatic scene from Batman Forever (Dr. Meridian role).

Details:

• Female, 20–25 (or looks early–mid 20s)

• One-day shoot (date TBD)

• Rate: $200

• Non-union

Project:

University-level directing assignment. Dialogue-driven scene with strong emotional tone.

Additional:

• Copy, credit, and footage provided

• Small, professional set

To Submit:

Please DM with headshot, resume, and reel (if available)

I’m seeking representation in Los Angeles
Actress (Zurich & LA based) looking for an experienced agent to help establish a strong footing in Los Angeles and New York.

If you’re an agent — or know someone who might be a great fit — I would truly appreciate a message.

Currently looking quite urgently and grateful for any leads.

Thank you so much.

items.text:
Crew Call (Vertical Series) 
Hello everyone! 

Looking for crew for a few Vertical Series.

Each series is only a one day shoot. (Can express interest for just one, or multiple)

Will be shot within the Brisbane, Australia Area. 

Crew Needed: 
- Cinematographer  (own equipment)
- Sound Recordist
- Gaffer  (own equipment)
- Editor 

Please email a.to.z.infinite.8@gmail.com

Thanks! 

Food and snacks provided. 

UNPAID 
UNPAID

Submission for our DABB Generals Day is now open! In partnership with Southwark Playhouse & Spotlight. 

In its 8th year running, we are super excited to be returning to Southwark Playhouse! 

All recalls & rehearsals will take place at Spotlight Studios. 

Bring on DABB Generals Day 2026!!

If you’re an actor from a Global Majority Background, this one’s for you! Apply via dabbofficial.com/dabbgeneralsday

Hey everyone!
I’m looking to cast for 3 different things:

First casing:

•1x white Caucasian female needed

•this Thursday 7th May

•approx 22-32

•exact timings TBC

•paid - again tbc but around £30/35 PH

•TELFORD

•content for a restaraunt - must be confident speaking on camera and have British accent (native)

Second:

•1x female needed

•approx 22-32

•any ethnicity

•High Wycombe, Buckinghamshire

•approx 1.30-3.30/4:30

•exact pay tbc but around £30/35 PH

• content for a restaraunt - must be confident speaking on camera and have British accent (native)

•This Wednesday 6th May 

Third:

•1x male 

•approx 25-32

•Instagram content for a female singer

•will be romantic, cinematic shots (nothing too intimate)

•exact date, timings and pay TBC!

•filming would take around 3/4 hours

•Birmingham - travel can potentially be covered for those coming from further away 

If interested in any of these castings please DM me or email onetaketalent1@gmail.com

Thanks so much!:)

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**JENNIFER - *****Character portrayed is Female, White, 40-50 ***

Jennifer is a mother above all else, even if it means putting her own needs to the side. When it comes to Miles, she is constantly stuck between trying to do what is best and constantly second guessing if she is doing it right. Since Miles’ father’s passing, she’s done her best to be both a Mom and a Dad, but deep down she always feels like she will never be enough. She doesn’t know how to talk about Miles’ dad, which adds an invisible tension to their relationship. When Miles gets sick, she will do anything to make sure he gets better.** LEAD ($100/day)**

**NATASHA - *****Character portrayed is Female, Mixed Japanese, 20-30***

Natasha is an only child who was brought up to be well mannered but to always stand up for herself. Her mother passed away when she was young and so growing up she was extremely close with her father Takeo. She understands what it means to hurt, because of her mother’s passing, which allows her to empathize with everyone she meets. Her intelligence not only lives in her emotional maturity but also in her intellect. Despite this, she believes the world works in mysterious ways, even when it comes to her father’s passing. **SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**JOYCIE - *****Character portrayed is Female, Japanese, 25-35***

Kiyoshi’s mom, Joycie, is a loving parent. She does her best to take care of children, despite them being interned. Her husband has been placed into forced labour of the Princeton highway and is rarely able to see them. She does her best to look out for not only her children, but all the other kids at Tashme. **1 line, 1 scene ($50/day)**

**UMP - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This umpire watches each pitch closely and calls the game with clear, authoritative “STRIKE” calls. Remains focused and impartial throughout the baseball. 2 lines, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**CATCHER - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 15-20***

This teenage catcher receives each pitch cleanly and taunts Miles quietly, trying to get in his head during the baseball game. Confident and slightly cocky, but stays locked into the play. 1 line, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET. ($50/day)**

**EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE - *****Character portrayed is Open Gender, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE rushes to get Miles into surgery at the hospital. **1 line (each), 1 scene ($50/day)**

**ADULT KIYOSHI (PHOTO DOUBLE) - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 30-50***

While Jennifer and Miles look through their family photo album, they find a photograph of Kiyoshi, standing proudly in front of their house. **($50/day)**

Hi everyone 👋

We’re Mangata Production, a new indie film production based in Vancouver, currently casting a **supporting female role** for a short film directed by **Regis Raffin**.

📍 **Shoot:** 1 day in June (exact date TBC)
📍 **Location:** North Vancouver (forest setting)
💰** $300 for the day**
🎬 **Non-union production**

We are looking for a **striking, model-type actress (between 20–40)** with natural confidence, and a good sense of humour! The role appears in a short, stylized and slightly surreal forest scene. Minimal dialogue.

📸 Please send:
* Headshot / standing shots
* Reel (if available) 
* Availability in June

Email us at : contact@mangata-music.com

Thanks!

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org
Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
Episode 43 of Beyond Reel Talk podcast with Tino Orsini.

Tino Orsini is an actor working across theatre and screen.

In this episode, he talks about playing Banksy in Ted Lasso, his early life, and how he got into acting. He also shares his time in Los Angeles, why he left, and what it was like coming back to London and continuing his career.

We get into the difference between theatre and screen, dealing with rejection, and why making your own work can make a real difference. He talks about his one-man show Ghosts of West Hollywood, which he wrote and is preparing to perform, along with the day-to-day reality of self-tapes and commercials.

We also touch on preparation, staying truthful in performances, and what success means to him as an actor.
items.previewDescription: When I get on stage, I feel at home - Tino Orsini - #BeyondReelTalk ep. 43

🎭 Audition slots are almost full!

Don't miss the opportunity to be involved in the UK amateur premiere of Kate Hamill's Dracula.

All (cast and crew) roles are unpaid
📨Email on DarkTheatreDale@proton.me for any other info.

🔗 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy by Kate Hamill,
St Aiden's Church, Sudden, Rochdale 
29-31 October 2026

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We had some last minute drop-outs and really need to fill our track and field team! We are filming at Harvard Gulch Park and your call time would be 4:30 PM.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet! 

https://forms.gle/NKksgUYCrZn38W5N9

THANK YOU IN ADVANCE!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props

**Melody ***Supporting*

25-60 / Any gender with drag queen energy 

Melody is Liam’s best friend, and she is magnificent. Glamorous, funny, and deeply principled, she leads the queer cavalry into the warehouse with queenly authority and zero hesitation. She is warm to Liam in the way of found family — no conditions, no questions, just presence. She and Declan recognize each other instantly in the parking lot: two people who showed up for exactly the same reason. They walk in together, side by side, in slow motion. She is a showstopper in every scene she’s in.

Strong comedic presence and warm queenly energy. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 

* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

 **Declan ***Supporting*

30-60 / Cis Man

Declan is Jake’s blue-collar buddy who shows up, no questions asked, with a convoy of trucks behind him. He is steady, laconic, and genuinely good. When he meets Melody in the parking lot, he assesses the situation in about four seconds and makes a plan to join forces with the queer cavalry. His walk into the warehouse alongside Melody is one of the film’s key images.

Physical ease and natural authority. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 
* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.

* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props

items.summary:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.

items.text:
An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

Not your resume. Not your training. Not your headshot.
Your soul.

Katie Doyle has spent 30 years transforming Hawaii from a filming backdrop into a real talent hub — fighting for local actors to tell their own stories on screen.

And her casting philosophy is something every actor needs to hear right now.

She is not looking for perfection. She is looking for presence. Authenticity. Generosity of spirit. The more interesting you are as a human being — the more she wants to cast you.

That is what your self-tape needs to communicate. Not a perfect read. A real human being.

Read the full story on OnSetReport — link in bio.
Ready to make sure your self-tape shows casting directors exactly who you are? Start your free 7-day trial at HowToSelfTape.com — full access, no credit card.
Link in bio 👆

items.summary:
An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

An Emmy-winning casting director says she knows what your soul is like within seconds.

Not your resume. Not your training. Not your headshot.
Your soul.

Katie Doyle has spent 30 years transforming Hawaii from a filming backdrop into a real talent hub — fighting for local actors to tell their own stories on screen.

And her casting philosophy is something every actor needs to hear right now.

She is not looking for perfection. She is looking for presence. Authenticity. Generosity of spirit. The more interesting you are as a human being — the more she wants to cast you.

That is what your self-tape needs to communicate. Not a perfect read. A real human being.

Read the full story on OnSetReport — link in bio.
Ready to make sure your self-tape shows casting directors exactly who you are? Start your free 7-day trial at HowToSelfTape.com — full access, no credit card.
Link in bio 👆

items.text:
i'm bored. anyone got a role, even as minute as trump's "manhood"? eccentric man; i have experience acting, albeit in China. fluent Mandarin, passable Swedish etc. can learn languages in weeks. IT engineer with AI skills. music composer. gimme a challenge.
gonna give Welsh a go soon. they say the grammatical mutations are difficult? mate, I have a degree in Chinese. bring it on 😂
my teeth are good for film.

items.text:
POWERHOUSE CASTING IS ORGANIZING AN OPEN CALL IN SEARCH OF BODY DOUBLES FOR A SOCIAL MEDIA CAMPAIGN 

IF YOU MATCH ONE OF THE SPECS LISTED BELOW, YOU’LL RECEIVE $50.00 CAD FOR YOUR TIME ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6. 

IF YOU’RE CONFIRMED FOR THE JOB, COMPENSATION WILL BE $400.00 CAD FOR THE REHEARSAL DAY (MAY 8 OR 9***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR BOTH DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE) & $1200.00 CAD FOR THE SHOOT DAY (MAY 10 TO 12***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR ALL DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE). 

YOU MUST MATCH ONE OF THE ROLES BELOW TO RECEIVE THE $50.00 CAD AUDITION FEE

IF YOU FIT & ARE FULLY AVAILABLE FOR THE DATES, PLEASE COME TO REVIVAL STUDIOS (Revival Studios, Building E, 629 Eastern Ave, Toronto) 
ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6 BETWEEN from 10:00AM UNTIL 5:00PM 

TALENT NEEDS TO BE AVAILABLE FOR MAY 8, 9, 10, 11 & 12)

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR…

1)
FEMALE 
WHITE
5’4” TO 5’6” IN HEIGHT
HIGH LEVEL SOCCER PLAYER ABLE TO DO KICK-UPS, FREESTYLE & AROUND-THE-WORLD. YOU MUST BE ABLE TO DEMONSTRATE THESE SKILLS ON-CAMERA. 

2)
MALE
BLACK
5’9” TO 5’12” IN HEIGHT 
SOFTER BUILD

3)
MALE
WHITE
5’8” TO 5’10” IN HEIGHT 
SLIGHT BUILD

items.text:
Musicalgroep MILO uit Knokke-Heist houdt open audities voor de musicalklassieker 'The Sound of Music'. Hiervoor zijn zij op zoek naar kinderen, jongeren en volwassenen. Vanaf de leeftijd van 6 jaar kan je inschrijven voor onze audities via musicalgroepmilo.be

Voorstellingen gaan door in Knokke-Heist in september 2027

audities eerste ronde vinden plaats op 11-12-18-19 juli 2026

Let op: de plaatsen zijn beperkt, dus snel inschrijven is de boodschap!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of musical instrument and text that says 'Musicalgroep MILO VZW presenteert SouND MUSIC MILO OPEN AUDITIES VOOR: KINDEREN (M/V/X) VAN TOT 12 JAAR VOOR DE ROLLEN VAN GRETL, MARTA, BRIGITTA KURT JONGEREN (M/V/X) A 13 TOT 17 JAAR VOOR DE ROLLEN VAN OUISA, FRIEDRICH, LIESL & ENSEMBLE VOLWASSENEN (M/V/X) VAN 18 TOT VOOR DE ROLLEN VAN MARIA, KAPITEIN VON TRAPP, BARONES, MAX, MOEDER OVERSTE, ZUSTERS, ROLF HERR ZELLER & ENSEMBLE MUSICALO VUSICALGROEPMILO.BE INSCHRIJVEN IVEN MOGELIJK TOT MET 30 30 JUNI 2026'

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy matki francuskiej dziewczynki ( casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 35 lat** do roli matki francuskiej dziewczynki. Kobieta wystąpi w 2 scenach ataku Niemców na budynek cywilny. W jednej scenie postać matki dziewczynki ma dialog po francusku ze swoją córką. Mile widziana osoba **z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrze czy Katowice.** Szukamy kogoś bez farbowanych włosów, bez malowanych paznokci czy braku tatuaży na twarzy. Zdjęcia próbne planujemy **17.05.26 między 10:30 a 15:00 ( Niedziela )**

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczeliśmy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text: ❗️3 ostatnie darmowe miejsca!

sharedPost.text:
❗️Ostatnie 3 miejsca na BEZPŁATNE WARSZTATY TEATRALNE

Zapraszamy do udziału w intensywnych, całkowicie bezpłatnych warsztatach teatralnych, podczas których wspólnie stworzymy 20-minutowy spektakl – od pomysłu aż po finałowy pokaz na scenie. Wybrani uczestnicy programu będą mieli szansę reprezentować Polskę podczas międzynarodowego spotkania w Brukseli i poznać uczestników z innych krajów!

🐛Dla kogo? Dla każdego, kto ma 15-25 lat. 
📅 Finał projektu: 19 czerwca 2026
 🌸 Pierwsze zajęcia już 9 maja! 

👉Więcej informacji i zapisy: 👇👇
https://www.teatrzelazny.pl/artvocacy-for-the-union/

Warsztaty organizowane we współpracy z ARTVOCACY FOR THE (U)NION, projekt międzynarodowy

items.text:
Lubisz jeździć? Zajedź na casting

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla branży motoryzacyjnej.

Miejsce: Warszawa
Zgłoszenia do 06.05.2026 do końca dnia
Dni zdjęciowe: 20-21.05.2026
Atrakcyjna stawka

Kogo szukamy?

MĘŻCZYZNA - 20-45 lat
rude włosy, piegi, mile widziany język niemiecki (nie jest to wymóg)

NASTOLATEK (chłopak) - 13-18 lat
rude włosy, piegi, itp.

CHŁOPIEC - 5-10 lat
rude włosy, piegi, itp.

"RANDKA" kobieta - 20-35 lat (otwartość na zróżnicowanie etniczne)
diastema, piegi, itp.

"MATKA" kobieta - 20-40 lat
piegi, rude włosy, itp.

EPIZODY:

"OJCIEC" - 27-40 lat
piegi, rude włosy, itp.
"LEKARZ" mężczyzna - 35-60 lat
"PIELĘGNIARKA" kobieta - 25-50 lat
"KOLEDZY Z KLASY" (chłopcy i dziewczynki) - 13-18 lat (otwartość na zróżnicowanie etniczne)
"MŁODY PIŁKARZY" chłopiec - 6-12 lat
"WNUCZKA" dziewczynka - 5-10 lat

Link do zgłoszenia:

https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting040/

Nie przegap swojej szansy! Zgłoś się już dziś

items.text:
Chętnie podejmę współpracę jako statystka (początkująca)
Cześć! Chciałabym spróbować swoich sił jako statystka. Nie mam jeszcze doświadczenia, ale jestem osobą bardzo dyspozycyjną, cierpliwą i punktualną. Interesuje mnie praca w Warszawie i okolicy.

Kilka słów o mnie:

• Wiek: 16 lat

• Wzrost: 160 cm

• Oczy: Ciemnobrązowe, wyrazista oprawa oczu.

• Włosy: Ciemne, średniej długości 

• Znaki szczególne: Okulary korekcyjne, septum oraz kolczyk w brwi

Brak doświadczenia nadrabiam dużym zaangażowaniem i chęcią do nauki. Jeśli mój profil pasuje do jakiegoś projektu, zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu, A ja się do Was odezwę!!

items.text:
## 🎷 CASTING: Aktor/Saksofonista (19-28 lat)

Poszukujemy odtwórcy głównej roli do filmu krótkometrażowego. Projekt **płatny**.

**KOGO SZUKAMY?**
* Mężczyzna w wieku **19–21 lat**.
* **Umiejętność gry na saksofonie** (warunek konieczny).

**ZGŁOSZENIA:** Wyślij maila na adres: **korab.karo@gmail.com**

**W treści prosimy o:**
1. Imię, nazwisko i wiek.
2. Aktualne zdjęcia (twarz i sylwetka).
3. Krótkie nagranie (self-tape), na którym przedstawiasz się i grasz dowolny fragment na saksofonie.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people
May be an image of saxophone, clarinet and trumpet

rude włosy, piegi, itp.

CHŁOPIEC - 5-10 lat
rude włosy, piegi, itp.

diastema, piegi, itp.

piegi, rude włosy, itp.

items.text:
W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące  role męskie:

1.Dziki (43) – dobrze zbudowany, może mieć tatuaże. Kieruje gangiem handlarzy narkotyków, który zajmuje się głównie rozprowadzaniem fentanylu. Gdy dochodzi do pobicia Grażyny i kradzieży narkotyków, postanawia sam namierzyć sprawców i odbić towar. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2.Sebastian Wroński (53) – podstarzały podrywacz. Zamożny. Przemocowiec, który robi się agresywny po alkoholu. Często zdradzał żonę. Cały czas szukał młodszych kobiet, żeby je sponsorować w zamian za seks.

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3.Zdzisław Marecki (54) – średniego wzrostu, chudawy, trochę schorowany. Drobny złodziejaszek, mieszka w ośrodku dla osób, które niedawno opuściły zakład karny.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4.Ernest (29) – dobrze zbudowany. Chłopak Patrycji. Bardzo chciałby wejść do półświatka. Ma nadzieję, że napad na Grażynę mu w tym pomoże.

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

5.Gruby (28) – silny, wysoki, masywny. Kolega Ernesta zwerbowany do pomocy w napadzie na Grażynę. NIEZBĘDNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

6.Igor Krawczyk (43) – oficjalnie bezrobotny, ale pracuje na czarno w szemranej firmie pożyczkowej. Wpada w spiralę zbrodni, kończy na zabójstwie żony i jej kochanka. AKTOR

Daty: 20. i 23. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7.Robert Zalewczuk, ps. Maniek (27) – drobny przestępca, typ dresika-oszusta. Przy kasie, ale ubiera się bez gustu. 

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

8.Roman Niciak (41) – ma biznes z nielegalnymi pożyczkami. Nalana twarz alkoholika, agresywny i wulgarny.

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9.Barman (31) – barman w spelunce. 

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące  role męskie:

sharedPost.text:
🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny rozgrywanej w pubie.

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 5 i 6 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej  

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „5-6 maja”

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– miejsce zamieszkania  
– wiek  
– wzrost  
– rozmiar ubrania  
– 2 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

⚡ 19×20W RGBA IP65 Outdoor Par Light

🔹 19pcs 20W high power RGBA LEDs
🔹 Strong wash output with rich color mixing
🔹 45° wide beam angle for large coverage
🔹 1800K–8500K adjustable color temperature
🔹 CRI ≥92 for natural and accurate colors
🔹 16-bit smooth linear dimming
🔹 1–30Hz fast strobe with powerful flash effect
🔹 900Hz–25KHz high refresh rate, flicker-free for camera

🔹 Multi-channel control (CH14–CH106)
🔹 DMX512 + RDM protocol support
🔹 OLED display for easy operation
🔹 DMX signal software upgrade

🔹 IP65 waterproof, built for outdoor use
🔹 Die-cast aluminum housing with natural cooling
🔹 Anti-corrosion design for long-term projects
🔹 Smart temperature protection system

💡 Perfect for stage lighting, concerts, events & outdoor engineering projects

📲 WhatsApp: 16676786923

sharedPost.text:
⚡ 19×20W RGBA IP65 Outdoor Par Light

🔹 19pcs 20W high power RGBA LEDs
🔹 Strong wash output with rich color mixing
🔹 45° wide beam angle for large coverage
🔹 1800K–8500K adjustable color temperature
🔹 CRI ≥92 for natural and accurate colors
🔹 16-bit smooth linear dimming
🔹 1–30Hz fast strobe with powerful flash effect
🔹 900Hz–25KHz high refresh rate, flicker-free for camera

🔹 Multi-channel control (CH14–CH106)
🔹 DMX512 + RDM protocol support
🔹 OLED display for easy operation
🔹 DMX signal software upgrade

🔹 IP65 waterproof, built for outdoor use
🔹 Die-cast aluminum housing with natural cooling
🔹 Anti-corrosion design for long-term projects
🔹 Smart temperature protection system

💡 Perfect for stage lighting, concerts, events & outdoor engineering projects

📲 WhatsApp: 16676786923

items.text: Hello! I am a 21 year old actor based in Sunderland UK looking for work, who is willing to travel and commute for auditions and jobs, at the minute I have been cast in a production set to take place in the Edinburgh Fringe festival in August 2026, very eager to take part in other credited roles whether this be student films or other paid opportunities, I have a range of different accents I am able to perform in, as well as having a strong emotional range in my performances, would be great to get my hands on some opportunities!!

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I’m currently putting together a team for a short psychological filmI’ll be shooting in London (Waterloo area).

This project is being created as part of my film school application, so I’m aiming for a strong, cinematic result with a clear visual style and atmosphere.

The story focuses on isolation, perception, and emotional tension, with a dark, intimate tone and character-driven storytelling.

LOOKING FOR:

1. FEMALE for a partner role. I will send script in DM

DETAILS:

• Location: London (WATERLOO)

• Shoot dates: (MAY 5)

• Casting ASAP

• This is an unpaid project, but:

◦ Travel expenses covered (within London)

◦ Food & drinks provided during shoot

◦ Full credit + material for your portfolio/showreel

WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR:

People who genuinely care about storytelling and want to create something visually and emotionally strong, even on a small-scale production.

TO APPLY:

Please send:

• Your portfolio / showreel

• Any relevant work

• A short message about your experience

You can comment below or message me directly.

Let’s create something powerful

items.text:
Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

CASTING CALL – PAID (LOS ANGELES)
Casting a female actor for a dramatic scene from Batman Forever (Dr. Meridian role).

Details:

• Female, 20–25 (or looks early–mid 20s)

• One-day shoot (date TBD)

• Rate: $200

• Non-union

Project:

University-level directing assignment. Dialogue-driven scene with strong emotional tone.

Additional:

• Copy, credit, and footage provided

• Small, professional set

To Submit:

Please DM with headshot, resume, and reel (if available)

items.text:
BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED - NON UNION CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for **NON UNION ACTORS **to be *background cast* in our project which will be filming on **MAY 20. **Exact call times for background cast is TBD however, we would need you to keep your entire day available until the exact times are confirmed.

The background cast are bar patrons who are seated in the bar. 

The background we are looking for:

-any ethnicity

-non-union

-available all day on May 20th 2026

The deadline for submissions to our email is **May 04** **2026** @ 11:59PM.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)
