The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

topComments.text: Hatte ich oben vergessen: Drehorte, die infrage kommen, sind entweder Berlin oder die Region um Bayreuth, an einem Wochenende im August oder September (genauer Termin steht noch nicht).

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

topComments.text: 🤣"⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst". Der Witz in Spraydosen. Zahlt die Leute!

Dann melde dich einfach bei uns !

items.text:
🎭 ARE YOU SPENDING HOURS IN ACTING CLASSES WITH VERY LITTLE REAL ACTING TIME?
After speaking to hundreds of actors, I keep hearing the same thing:

You spend hours in class…

but only get 15–20 minutes actually acting.

Then you’re given notes like:

“make it more believable”

“be more truthful”

“make bolder choices”

…but no one shows you how to actually do that.

No clear exercises.

No repeatable technique.

No measurable progress.

So you leave feeling frustrated, unsure what to fix, and questioning your ability.

Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I went from having no connections at 14 to signing with a top Hollywood agent at 17, moving to LA, and booking a Netflix series regular within three months.

That didn’t come from guesswork. It came from having a clear, repeatable process.

That’s exactly what my program achieves. 

I’ve created a structured acting program that breaks down the core skills you actually need, with specific exercises to build each one.

1-hour private sessions over Zoom.

In our sessions, we focus on:

• Embodying a wide range of characters in a believable, grounded way

• Creating real emotion on demand, at any intensity

• Transforming your physicality for different roles

• Learning lines quickly and retaining them with ease

• Delivering lines with clarity, confidence, and credibility

The result is an actor who knows how to step into any role with confidence and deliver emotionally impactful performances consistently.

If you’re tired of vague direction…

If you want to know exactly what skill you’re building each session…

And if you actually want to spend your time acting and making real progress…

Comment ACTING below or send me a DM 🤗

items.text:
ASAP CAST CALL – SHORT FILM (LONDON) FILMING TOMORROW | May 5
Hi everyone!

I’m currently putting together a team for a short psychological filmI’ll be shooting in London (Waterloo area).

This project is being created as part of my film school application, so I’m aiming for a strong, cinematic result with a clear visual style and atmosphere.

The story focuses on isolation, perception, and emotional tension, with a dark, intimate tone and character-driven storytelling.

LOOKING FOR:

1. FEMALE for a partner role. I will send script in DM

DETAILS:

• Location: London (WATERLOO)

• Shoot dates: (MAY 5)

• Casting ASAP

• This is an unpaid project, but:

◦ Travel expenses covered (within London)

◦ Food & drinks provided during shoot

◦ Full credit + material for your portfolio/showreel

WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR:

People who genuinely care about storytelling and want to create something visually and emotionally strong, even on a small-scale production.

TO APPLY:

Please send:

• Your portfolio / showreel

• Any relevant work

• A short message about your experience

You can comment below or message me directly.

Let’s create something powerful

‘Daisies’ Short Film Casting Call
Hi everyone,

I’m currently producing a short film titled ‘Daisies’, and we’re now casting.

Logline: When their affair is discovered by her violent boyfriend, a man goes on the run with his best friend while the woman he loves faces the consequences of their secret.

More information (full plot, writer’s notes, mood board):

www.writenbystokes.com 

We are casting:

* 2 Female actors (playing age 18–30)

* 2 Male actors (playing age 18–30)

(Midlands-based actors

Food and travel expenses will be provided 

First Shoot

* Date: 25th May 2026

* Location: Birmingham

* Actors: 2 Female

* Time: From 12pm onwards

Second Shoot

* Date: TBC

* Location: Peak District

* Actors: 2 Male

* Time: Full day

A possible third shoot, depending on the other two. 

If interested, please send: 

* Headshot

* Showreel (if available)

* Your location

Email: cjamesstokes19@gmail.com

📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):
We are looking for raw talent, not just resumes. If you have the heart to build this with us, apply below.
👉 APPLY HERE: [https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab]

2. FOR THE SOUL SESSION (Vents & Confessions):
To share your story or your "Before & After" Glow-Up, you must follow our professional format.
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com
(Subject: [SOUL SESSION] - Name/Alias - Zone)

3. FOR TALENT & MUSIC (DJs, Producers, Poets):
Want us to feature your craft or use your beats in our soundtracks?
👉 EMAIL: infosodieskasitv@gmail.com
(Attach your clips

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

Please send headshots and info to [lethimplayinfo@gmail.com](mailto:lethimplayinfo@gmail.com)

And we will send you instructions for self tape!

Shooting near LA in Lancaster June 27th and 28th!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)
Between Two Lives
A Solkem Studios Film
Hello, all

        I am currently seeking an understudy for the lead role of Jordan in my upcoming short film “Between Two Lives,” a faith-based, character-driven story about identity, growth, and the struggle between two different paths in life.
This role is central to the story and requires an actor who can portray emotional depth, internal conflict, and personal growth.

   ROLE: JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)

Male, mid–late 20s

Strong ability to portray emotional and internal conflict

Natural, grounded delivery (not overly theatrical)

Comfortable with faith-based themes

Casting Note:
Preferably seeking an African/Black actor for this role, but open to all qualified actors.
Note:
This role includes a few kissing scenes (non-explicit).
There is NO nudity or explicit content, but actors should be comfortable with on-screen intimacy.

       CHARACTER DESCRIPTION:
Jordan is caught between two lives—one rooted in familiar habits, past relationships, and comfort, and another leading toward growth, peace, and purpose.
His journey is emotional, reflective, and spiritual, requiring a subtle but powerful performance.

KEY PERFORMANCE ELEMENTS:

Internal struggle and quiet emotional moments

Honest, grounded dialogue

Transformation over time

Vulnerability in key scenes

Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado
Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026. ( MUST BE AVAILABLE THESE DATES TO SUBMIT  THANK YOU )

Production: Independent / Faith-Based Film

Compensation: Unpaid project,but will provide food, Drinks and snacks.  

On-screen credit

IMDb credit

Copy of the final film

TO SUBMIT:
Headshot
Reel or past work (if available)
Contact information
Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com
Phone: 720-572-0029

    I'm Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong, meaningful story to life.

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m a colombian actress in Denver looking to build a creative crew for consistent, high-quality content in English and Spanish.

I’ve written and produced several shorts on my own that have gained some **interest on social media**, but I want to team up with others to level up our production value.

This is a **collaborative passion project, **the goal is to create professional scenes/shorts in **one-day shoots** to grow our reels, gain recognition, and eventually pitch larger funded projects together. **Students are more than welcome!**

**Interested? Please drop a comment with:**
1. What role you’d play (Writer, DP, Editor, Actor, etc.)
2. A quick note on your experience or a link to your work.

**I'd love to create something together!** ✨

topComments.text: Hello I’m an actor and speak both languages English/Spanish.
Hola Ludy - I'm an actor/screenwriter. Mi español es intermedio, pero estoy buscando oportunidades artísticas para aprender más. Message me and Ill send you a link to my most recent short film!

Anyone have experience with baby modeling in the north Jersey area? Have a one year old who smiles great and loves his picture being taken. just don’t want to get scammed from anyone 
Thanks ❤️

topComments.text:
Submit to agencies: 

Zuri 
Nymm 
State
Elevate 
Stellar 

Never  ever ever ever pay for anything other than commission fees after a job is done - which is auto taken from the agencies !  Ever

You’ll get scammed by not being with an agency-  that’s for absolute certain.
It’s not all rainbows and butterflies though! 
You have to be ready at the drop of a dime. 
It may take months for an audition or job! 
It’s a VERY competitive industry.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM 🎬
We are looking for actors to be part of an exciting Afrikaans short film for a student production.

🎥 Project Type: Short Film

🗣 Language: Afrikaans

Roles:

We are casting for Afrikaans-speaking male characters. Due to the story and character backgrounds, these roles are written for Caucasian actors.

Requirements:

• Male actors

• Fluent in Afrikaans

• Passion for acting (experience is a bonus, not required)

This is a great opportunity to gain on-set experience and build your portfolio.

If you’re interested or know someone who might fit the roles, please get in touch for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'we CASTING CALL are looking for for our upcoming male student actors film specifications Race: Race:Caucasian ·language: Afrikaans •Age between 20-40 (Note) This Film contains LGBTQ+ Themes and portrays a same sex romantic relationship 0-0766528071 Email-ileisilroductio@gmail.c'

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – VOLUNTEER ACTORS WANTED (Johannesburg soweto)
Hello everyone 👋
My name is Karabelo and I am currently starting a small independent YouTube filmmaking project. I am looking for people who are interested in acting in a short film for experience and creativity.
This is not a paid job — it is a voluntary opportunity for anyone who wants to gain acting experience, be part of a creative project, and appear in a YouTube short film.
🎭 No acting experience is needed — beginners are welcome.
🎬 You will be guided during filming and helped with your lines.
FRO MORE INFORMATION 
WHATSAPP NUMBER::60 883 6584 
You can also call 📞

items.text:
🌟SKUESPILLERE SØGES🌟
Har du en skuespiller gemt i maven eller kender du én som vil øve sit skuespil foran kamera? Så er det lige præcis dig vi leder efter!🫵🏼
Vi er fire medievidenskabsstuderende fra Syddansk Universitet som søger skuespillere (både hovedroller samt mindre statistroller med og uden replikker) til vores eksamens-kortfilm “Den aften” med optagelser på Nordsjælland i slutningen af maj. Hvad vi søger:

🎬Hovedrolle 1: Magnus; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
🎬Hovedrolle 2: Lauge; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
(OBS: læs nedenstående casting-call, da rollerne har nogle intime scener)

🎬Birolle 1: Teresse, 22-26 (Langt lyst hår)
🎬Yderligere statister: agere gæster til en havefest (alle aldre og køn er velkomne)

PRAKTISK INFORMATION: 
📆Optagelserne finder sted på Nordsjælland i nærheden af Allerød d. 23 maj (for alle) + den 24. maj (for hovedrollerne + birollen).  (Tidsrummet af arbejdsdagen(e) varierer på baggrund af hvilken rolle(r) du ønsker at besætte).

💰
Jobbet er ulønnet, men vi sørger for forplejning på set.

LYDER DET SOM NOGET FOR DIG❓
Så skal du sende en ansøgning med:
🌟Navn
🌟Alder
🌟Hvilke(n) rolle du ønsker at ansøge til
🌟Vedhæfte et billede af dig selv (nærbillede + totalbillede) 
🌟Skuespillererfaring (ikke påkrævet men ét stort plus)
🌟Telefonnummer
🌟Hvor I landet du er bosat

Disse informationer skal sendes til vores caster & skuespiller-ansvarlige: Line Møller Ipsen på følgende mail: Linelmi12@gmail.com - Ansøgningsfrist:  d. 10 maj kl. 12.00. 

Har du yderligere spørgsmål, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til Line over Messenger eller via mail - så vil du blive kontaktet indenfor alm. kontortid.  

Opslaget må meget gerne deles, så vi kan finde de helt rette til at besætte rollerne til vores afsluttende eksamen.

TUSIND TAK PÅ FORHÅND 🩵
Holdet bag “Den aften”
Johan, Line, Niklas & Sara

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting cai Den afien Finder sted til Lauge og Teresses forlovelsesfest pả Nordsjaelland. Lauge har nogle máneder forinden haft en seksuel erfaere med sin kammarart Magnus. Magnus har sveert ved at slippe tanken om Lauge og mere specefikt den aften. For hvordan kan han pludselig veeret forlovet og ovenikobet med en kvinde? HOVEDPERSONERNE ROLLERNE TIL MAGNUS OG LAUGE VIL HAVE INTIME SCENER HERUNDER KYS OG SCENER I LETPÄKLEDT TOJ. Hvis du onsker at vide mere, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til vores caster samt skuespiller ansvarlige Line Moller Ipsen. HOLDET BAG DEN AFTEN'

items.text:
🎬 Action Performer / Physical Actor (Hannover)

Hey, ich bin Nsimba (28) und baue aktuell gezielt meine Präsenz als physischer Performer im Bereich Film & Action auf.

Mein Fokus:

– dynamische Bewegung & Körperkontrolle  

– Fight / Action-orientierte Performance  

– starke visuelle Präsenz & Charakter  

Ich interessiere mich für:

– Filmprojekte (Action, Musikvideo, experimentell)  

– Fight Choreography / Stunt-Richtung  

– Kollaborationen mit kreativen Leuten  

– Filmemacher für Action-/Fight-Szenen

– Kontakte im Bereich Stunts / Performance

Ich bringe Energie, Ausdruck und die Bereitschaft, mich voll reinzugeben.

Wenn du an Projekten arbeitest oder in die Richtung gehst → meld dich 🤝

items.text:
Hey everyone!

I’m building out a strong acting/modeling portfolio and could use some outside perspective.

I already have commercials and video work in my portfolio, but I’m dialing in the photo side and want honest input on what actually stands out for industry use.

Here’s a folder with all my raw images:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing)

If you’re open to helping:

• Open the folder in grid view  

• Scroll through and pick the strongest shots for acting/modeling  

• When you find one you like, open it and comment: YES  

Only mark the ones you genuinely think are strong. No need to go through everything.

If you can, try to keep it to your top 15–30 images.

Appreciate any time you put into this. Getting real outside feedback helps me narrow this down fast.

items.text:
Hi everyone!! My name is Cole and I’m 20! I’m currently modeling full time but I’m VERY interested in cinematography and I really want to get into the world of acting. I’d love to connect with anyone that has any experience in this field and maybe some opportunities. 

Please feel free to shoot me a message or contact me via: 

Instagram: colewwalkerr
Email: colewalker0914@gmail.com
WhatsApp: +1 760 448 0399

I really appreciate anyone that can help me out!  😄😄😄

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been amazed and grateful by the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role.

items.text:
Casting Call - Paid, Non-union

I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video.

Looking for:
• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 50-68
• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous male, age 30-49

Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:
The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face on camera. One of the products is a beard moisturizer, so please apply if you keep a clean shaved face OR a short beard that will not be shaved off. 

Location: TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 per talent for approximately 2-3 hours. 

To Apply:
Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:
• Your availability
• Recent photos or headshots
• Your location

Subject line: “product video casting”

items.text:
Hi There! I am directing a short film for Vancouver Film School titled To Blend In. We are looking for a Spanish and English speaking female and male actor for our two leads.

Filming June 3-5 in Vancouver. Union affiliation does not matter. This is an unpaid project with catering and crafty provided. Callbacks are Tuesday, May 5 and Wednesday, May 6 between 3-8pm at 151 W Cordova St.

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS: Please send a resume, headshot and demo reel if applicable to toblendin@gmail.com and indicate which role you would like to be considered for.

After surviving a xenophobic assault, a young Colombian immigrant, Laura, must choose between erasing her identity to feel safe or reaching out for help to reclaim her voice.

Laura (Spanish/English speaking woman)

Age range: 19 - 24

Laura is a young Colombian immigrant, who has ambitious dreams of moving to the United States pursuing her studies and independence. She is kind, optimistic and emotionally sensitive. After surviving a violent racist assault, fear begins to dictate her choices. She suppresses her language and changes her appearance to feel safe. Her journey is an internal struggle between survival and authenticity.

Daniel (Spanish/English male)

Age range: 20 - 25

Daniel is a Latino immigrant whose life is already established in the United States. He is respectful and grounded. His actions show comfort as he cares for Laura, wishing her to reconnect with her Latina roots. Daniel is a metaphor for the welcoming nature of the Latino community, even outside of his home.

Message me directly with your portfolio/IG.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM

Project Title: Fading Lines
Production Type: Independent Feature Film
Shoot Dates: May 15th – 17th
Location: Denver, Colorado 
Compensation: $1,000 (flat) + IMDb Credit + Footage for Reel

SYNOPSIS 
Fading Lines follows three estranged childhood friends who reunite after a funeral, spending one night confronting buried secrets, unresolved tensions, and the lasting impact of grief, as they question whether their bond can survive adulthood.

ROLES

LEAD ROLES
NIA (Female, 18–25, Any Ethnicity)
Sharp, ambitious, and quick-witted. Nia left her hometown in pursuit of bigger dreams, but beneath her independence lies unresolved guilt for walking away. She presents strength, yet quietly yearns for connection.

JORDAN (Male, 19–23, Any Ethnicity)
Grounded and dependable. Jordan stayed behind, carrying the weight of family responsibility while wrestling with his own desire for more. His calm exterior often conceals deeper frustrations.

ZARA (Female, 18–24, Any Ethnicity)
Bold, passionate, and emotionally complex. Zara uses humor and confidence as armor, masking a deeper sense of abandonment. She struggles with feeling left behind—and questions where she truly belongs.

SUPPORTING ROLES
MAYA (Female, 17–19, Any Ethnicity)
Zara’s younger cousin. Observant, sharp-tongued, and unfiltered. Maya challenges the group’s narratives with honesty, often forcing them to confront truths they’d rather avoid.

MRS. CARTER (Female, 60s–70s, Any Ethnicity)
A respected elder in the community. Quiet, reflective, and deeply insightful. She offers perspective on loss, memory, and reconciliation, serving as an emotional anchor in the story.

TO SUBMIT:
Email your headshot, resume, and city of residence to iconmediafilm@gmail.com
Subject line:
“[Your Name] – Fading Lines”

topComments.text: This was also just posted in the NYC Metro Area Actors/Actresses Community Facebook page as a local shoot in Brooklyn on the exact same dates.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: Table Read
I am doing a virtual table read for my feature film script "Marshlights" on Saturday, May 9th from 2-5pm and are in need of actors to read the roles. I will be seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future.

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately.

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read.
WHEN: Saturday, May 9th @ 2-5pm
WHO: Written by Emily Stephens
PROJECT NAME: Marshlights (101 pages)
GENRE: Southern Gothic / Historical Drama
SUMMARY: The revelation of a young trans woman in a small post-reconstruction town in South Carolina causes confusion and ultimately a showdown with local white supremacist theology leading to a violent reckoning.

I am looking for a narrator along with the following roles.

CHARACTERS:Luke/Lucy (white/early 20s, trans actors are encouraged to submit): a trans woman who is the child of an aristocratic line, her father a Colonel from the civil war. She's curious, and (post-transition) lively, a little reckless, and even flirtatious.
Mark (black/mid 20s): a constant servant for Lucy and her family. He is deeply loyal and kind. He accepts Lucy's transition and does his best to protect her.
Esau (white/early 20s): Lucy's best friend and son of the local pastor. Esau wrestles endlessly with Luke/Lucy who he loves and the expectations and fragility of his own masculinity. **Filled**

Pastor Green (white/late 40s): a deeply patriarchal true believer of a white supremacist theology that grants the town his version of order.
Colonel Ashford (white/late 50s): former civil war Colonel and very rigid man with a distinct conception of masculinity defined through labor and sweat.
Mahala (black/late 50s): former slave and a major part of the black community. Honest and powerful keeper of community memory and folklore. **Filled**

Amos(black/30s): a seminary trainee black preacher who acts as the less folkloric spiritual leader. Hard working to support his community and it's elders.

Mrs. Prioleau(black/40s): keeper of community after Mahala's death. Focused on keeping her community safe. **Filled**

Saint Lucia (mythic): the literal embodiment of the saint appears to help Lucy be revealed. She is disconnected from time.

Several of the readers will be assigned other smaller roles throughout the script.

If you are interested please email: emily.g.stephens@proton.me

items.text:
Casting Quantum Entanglement
**Production Type: **Independent Short Film

**Contact: **QuantumEntanglementCasting@gmail.com

**Run time:** Short

**Compensation: **Paid (see individual characters for specifics)

**Filming Window: **July 25-29 (tentative)

**Filming Location:** Denver area

**Casting window:** Submissions deadline: May 10, in-person callbacks May 15 and May 23rd.

Synopsis: Quantum Entanglement is a short sci-fi rom-com exploring themes of consciousness, AI sentience, Quantum Physics and mythology within the context of the radical, risk-taking vulnerability required for human connection.

Logline: A lonely physics professor with hidden telekinetic powers settles for the safety of an AI girlfriend—until a spark with a human colleague forces him to choose between keeping his secret and risking a real shot at love.

***We are committed to diverse, inclusive casting to represent all cultures that exist within Academia, where our story takes place. We are open to submissions from qualified performers, without regard to disability, race, age, color, national origin, ethnic origin or any other basis unless specifically indicated.**** * 

**Character Breakdown:**

**Jyn:**  (Supporting)  Female, 40’s, any ethnicity. A humanities professor with a penchant for mythology, she’s warm, artsy, put-together, grounded, quick-witted and clever (her mouth moves almost as fast as her mind), has a strong sense of self and and is very at home in her physical body.  Intimacy details: one scripted kiss. Will have an Intimacy Coordinator for the project who will be on set during filming of all intimacy scenes. RATE: $300 flat (estimated 3-4 days)

**BERU:** (Supporting) Female, 18+, VO only, but will be recorded on set during filming. She’s a robot with a maternal instinct, anxiety and a southern accent. Her voice is soothing, warm, and polished with clarity and pristine enunciation. Think Reese Witherspoon. RATE: $300 flat (estimated 3-4 days)

**Wren:**  (Supporting) Gender non-conforming, 18-30. Intelligent, curious, adventurous, open-minded, has Gen Z non binary street style with flair. Highly encourage nonbinary actors with a range of comedy experience, from deadpan to slapstick, to submit. RATE: $100 (1 day)

**Please submit headshot/resume/demos to:**

**[QuantumEntanglementCasting@gmail.com](mailto:QuantumEntanglementCasting@gmail.com)**** no later than May 10th. Self-tapes will be requested from select submissions. **

**Production Team:** Ann Allsopp (Director), Shawn B. Young (EP, Writer, Actor), Stephanie Dees (EP, Writer, Actor), Haleigh Burckley (Line Producer), Jason Strong (1st AD), Justin Balog (DP)

**Director:** Ann Allsopp is a Denver-based director, writer, and producer. Her films, including That Time of the Month and Heartless, have screened at dozens of festivals worldwide, earning awards for direction, storytelling, and ensemble performance. Beyond narrative film, Ann’s work spans music videos for indie artists, commercial campaigns for global brands like REI and VISA, and documentary projects for National Geographic, A&E, and MrBeast. In 2022, Ann founded Psychopomp Pictures, an independent production company dedicated to cultivating bold, character-driven stories and amplifying underrepresented voices on both sides of the camera. She graduated from Florida State University with a degree in Advertising in 2010, and completed the Writing/Directing program at Colorado Film School in 2023.

PRZESMYK sezon 2 ostatni rozdział.                                                      

Od kilku miesięcy widzicie  FB Studio ABM relacje i ogłoszenia z realizacji tajemniczego serialu. Pewnie już wszyscy wiedzą , ale my dopiero dzisiaj możemy to ogłosić. Tak, to jest drugi sezon serialu PRZESMYK.  

W PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU ZAMIESZCZAMY link do formularza zgłoszeniowego. 

Zapraszamy do wypełniania go mieszkańców WARSZAWY i najbliższych okolic.  

Poszukujemy: 
komandosów - osób dobrze zbudowanych, wysokich, kulturystów, bokserów, zapaśników, judoków, doświadczonych zawodników jak i emerytowanych sportowcó. Zapraszamy panó i panie  w wieku 30-50 lat i  epizodystów - również w wieku 30-50 

Wszystkie szczegóły i stawki w formularzu zgoszeniowym. Link do niego w PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU.

TO JUŻ OSTATNIA SZANSA NA UDZIAŁ W DRUGIM SEZONIE  PRZESMYKU!!!

Studio ABM  najkrótsza droga na plan filmowy!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING – EPIZODYŚCI 🎬  zdjęcia w Warszawie (brak zwrotów za dojazd) 5 i 6 maja (do potwierdzenia data i informacja czy dana rola będzie miała 1 dzień czy 2 dni zdjęciowe - prosimy o zgłoszenia osoby w pełni dyspozycyjne  5 i 6 maja)

Do pilotażowego odcinka serialu fabularyzowanego (true crime / paradokument) poszukujemy epizodystów do poniższych ról:  

🔹 1. Podejrzany (epizod mówiony)  
Mężczyzna 29–35 lat, wschodni akcent/język (rosyjski/ukraiński mile widziany), dobrze zbudowany, „gangsterski” vibe.  
💰 700 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 2. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, zmęczony, niepewny, człowiek żyjący na marginesie 
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 3. Mechanik (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 39–50 lat, zwyczajny, konkretny, mile widziana ciemniejsza karnacja lub opalenizna.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 4. Rekruter (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, sprytny, kontaktowy, typ sprzedawcy.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 5. Ekspert (epizod mówiony)  
Osoba 40–65 lat, spokojny, precyzyjny głos, możliwa gra bez pokazywania twarzy.  
💰 560 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 6. Jarosław (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–35 lat, z zarostem.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 7. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
25–35 lat, ładna brunetka, naturalny wygląd.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 8. Dziewczynka (epizod niemy)  - tylko dzieci ze zgodą PIP w naszej agencji!
ok. 7 lat  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 9. Mężczyzna (epizod mówiony)  
ok. 60 lat, wschodni wygląd/język  
💰 490 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 10. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
50–65 lat, korpulentna  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 11. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna ok. 50 lat, wysoki, krępy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 12. Bezdomny (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 40–65 lat, z bujną brodą  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 13. Nadawca (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–55 lat, raczej postawny, może być typ ochroniarza  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 14. Policjant (epizod niemy)  
Funkcjonariusz / typ mundurowy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  

➡️ W tytule: PILOT  

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:  
1. Imię i nazwisko  
2. Miejsce zamieszkania  
3. Wiek  
4. Wzrost  
5. Rozmiar ubrania  
6. 2 zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka, aktualne!)  
7. Link do wizytówki / nagrania (YouTube)  
8. Podaj numer roli do której się zgłaszasz
⏰ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 01.05 do godz. 20:00  

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥
